text:
Created attachment 225082
v1-0001-devel-py-python-bugzilla-Update-to-3.0.2.patch

[PATCH] devel/py-python-bugzilla: Update to 3.0.2

While here, remove '3.5+' requirement since ports default to python3 and
least pythond version is 3.6.

Changelog:
  https://github.com/python-bugzilla/python-bugzilla/releases/tag/v3.0.2
  https://github.com/python-bugzilla/python-bugzilla/releases/tag/v3.0.1
  https://github.com/python-bugzilla/python-bugzilla/releases/tag/v3.0.0
